product: Schedule jobs for Serverless GPU compute workloads
tagline: You can now create and schedule jobs for your Serverless GPU Compute workloads.
what_it_does: You can now create and schedule jobs for your Serverless GPU Compute workloads. Public Preview AI Runtime for single node tasks is in Public Preview. The distributed training API for multi GPU workloads remain in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: You can now create and schedule jobs for your Serverless GPU Compute workloads. Public Preview AI Runtime for single node tasks is in Public Preview.
key_takeaway: You can now create and schedule jobs for your Serverless GPU Compute workloads.
